questionHtml:
Which change causes the greatest increase in the initial rate of reaction between nitric acid and magnesium?

2HNO3 (aq) + Mg (s) → Mg(NO3)2 (aq) + H2 (g)

meta.title: Which change causes the greatest increase in the initial rate of reaction between nitric acid and magnesium? 2HNO3 (aq) + Mg (s) → Mg(NO3)2 (aq) + H2 (g)
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
